Records.authors: Charalampos Anastasiou, Stefan Beerli, Stefan Bucherer, Alejandro Daleo, Zoltan Kunszt
Records.description: The authors give the two-loop master integrals for the production of a Higgs boson via a massive quark and a squark loop.

Ice-cream cone family, ice-cone_L1_equal-mass-internal. Banana graph capped by a triangle, L loops, equal internal masses (all L+2 edges mass m). 3-point function: massless p1, p2 at the banana endpoints, off-shell q = p1+p2 at the apex; depends on the single scale q^2/m^2 (arXiv:2212.09550). The apex leg carries the off-shell scale: configs with an all-massless apex are the q^2 = 0 specialization, not family members (plan v1.2 finding B1). L = 1 is the equal-mass triangle with off-shell apex (library config e12_e2_e_/011_01_2_). In 2d the ice cone shares the same Calabi-Yau periods as the banana, two copies; an all-L master basis is known.

quadruple: {E^(eps*EulerGamma)*Gamma[1 + eps], (x1 + x2 + x3)^(-1 + 2*eps)*(-(mm*x1^2) - 2*mm*x1*x2 - mm*x2^2 - 2*mm*x1*x3 - 2*mm*x2*x3 + MM*x2*x3 - mm*x3^2)^(-1 - eps), {x1, x2, x3}, {mm, MM}}
